subject: ri_policy_router
summary: The aged weak continuation guard worsened both December fail windows and did not remove the intended late-December losing seam.
mechanism: The candidate only matches late aged weak continuation rows, while the targeted losing pair spans weak-pre-aged and already-strong continuation seams.
do_not_repeat: Do not treat the late-December losing rows as one homogeneous aged weak continuation seam.
Do not advance this candidate to keep-set or stress-set verification.
next_admissible_step: Frame the next candidate against one explicitly chosen seam class instead of retuning the aged weak guard further.
